---
title: "Glauca for Quarto"
subtitle: "IBM Plex Serif headings, IBM Plex Sans body, the blue as the one accent"
---

## A heading in IBM Plex Serif

Body text renders in IBM Plex Sans for sustained reading, with oldstyle figures
like 1851 and 1,234.56 sitting naturally in the line. Links carry the
[fire accent](https://example.org). The measure stays comfortable.

> A blockquote takes the fire on its leading edge.

```r
midas |>
  dplyr::summarise(mean_fev1 = mean(fev1, na.rm = TRUE))  # comment in cinis
```

The same document renders to PDF through Typst with the brand preamble, so
headings, body, links, and code stay on system.
